title: agoseris aurantiaca var. aurantiaca
intro: Agoseris aurantiaca var. aurantiaca, also known as the orange hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of the plant are attributed to its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agoseris aurantiaca var. aurantiaca include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
